name: Samantha Thavasa Japan Limited
summary: Samantha Thavasa Japan Limited primarily engages in the planning, manufacture, and sale of handbags and jewelry. The company offers wallets, card cases, jewelry, makeup bags, golf wear, gifts, and small accessories, as well as sweets. It sells its products under the brand names of Samantha Thavasa, Samantha Thavasa Deluxe, Samantha Vega, Samantha Kingz, Samantha Thavasa Petit Choice, Samantha Tiara, Samantha Tiara Bridal, Samantha Silva by Samantha Tiara, Samantha Silva Bridal, Samantha Thavasa under25, No.7 Samantha Thavasa, Samantha Thavasa Anniversary, and Sweets Samantha Thavasa. The company sells its products through its stores in Japan, South Korea, China, Singapore, Taiwan, and the United States. Samantha Thavasa Japan Limited was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
